name: workplace_safety_model_based_triage_tool_mesa_rig_utl
premise: A Workplace Safety response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving workplace safety model based triage tool mesa rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Harper Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Harper Ibrahim, accountable for a defensible call in Workplace Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Gideon Morales
agents.identity: I am Gideon Morales, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Workplace Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Harper Ibrahim must decide under rights vs utility. What does Harper Ibrahim do?
